pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the hoist hire company, surfacing key equipment categories, featured hire products, promotions, and highlighted safety guides, and acting as the main starting point for all task flows.
primary_functions: Let users navigate to main equipment hire categories such as electric chain hoists, manual chain hoists, lever hoists, beam trolleys, and scaffold hoists.
Provide a global search box to find equipment or resources by keyword.
Allow users to return here from any page via the site logo.
Highlight featured equipment, promotions, and important safety guides.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Electric Chain Hoists tile in the homepage equipment category grid.
Click Manual Chain Hoists tile in the homepage equipment category grid.
Click Lever Hoists tile in the homepage equipment category grid.
Click Beam Trolleys tile in the homepage equipment category grid.
Click Scaffold Hoists tile in the homepage equipment category grid.
Click main Equipment Hire CTA banner on the homepage.
Click a featured product card on the homepage.
Click the Safety Guides promo section on the homepage.
Click a highlighted safety guide article from the homepage.
Click Sign Up / Register CTA in the homepage hero or header.
Click cart icon in the header.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Home link and by clicking the site logo.
Users can enter index.html directly to land on the homepage.

pages.name: Equipment Category Listing
pages.description: Category-level equipment listing for browsing and filtering hire products (e.g., electric chain hoists, manual chain hoists), with date range selection, pricing estimates, and comparison controls.
primary_functions: Display a grid/list of hire products for a selected category (e.g., electric_chain_hoists, manual_chain_hoists, lever_hoists, beam_trolleys, scaffold_hoists) based on the categoryId URL parameter.
Provide filters for capacity, power source, hoist compatibility, lift height, environment/usage, IP rating, daily rate, and customer rating.
Provide a hire date range selector to set start and end dates for the hire period directly on the listing.
Offer sorting options such as daily rate low to high, lift height high to low, rating, and availability (e.g., in stock first).
Enable users to select products for comparison via compare checkboxes/icons and trigger the comparison page.
Allow users to open product detail pages by clicking a product card.
Allow quick actions on product cards such as Add to Cart and Add to Quote (where appropriate).

incoming_params.description: Equipment category to browse; one of all_equipment, electric_chain_hoists, manual_chain_hoists, lever_hoists, beam_trolleys, scaffold_hoists.
Optional ISO date string used to pre-populate the hire start date filter.
Optional ISO date string used to pre-populate the hire end date filter.
Optional minimum capacity (tonnes) filter value.
Optional maximum capacity (tonnes) filter value.
Optional power source filter; e.g., electric or manual.
Optional minimum lift height filter in meters.
Optional maximum lift height filter in meters.
Optional environment or usage filter; e.g., indoor, outdoor, indoor_outdoor.
Optional minimum IP rating filter, such as ip65.
Optional minimum daily rate filter.
Optional maximum daily rate filter.
Optional minimum average star rating filter.
Sort option identifier, such as daily_rate_asc, lift_height_desc, rating_desc, or availability_in_stock_first.
Current results page for pagination.
Number of products per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product card in the category listing.
Click the Compare Selected button after ticking compare checkboxes on multiple products.
Click cart icon in the header or a View Cart link after adding an item to the cart.
Click Quote Basket link in the header after adding items to the quote from the listing.

access_methods.description: Accessible via Equipment Hire, Electric Chain Hoists, Manual Chain Hoists, Lever Hoists, Beam Trolleys, and Scaffold Hoists header links, each passing the appropriate categoryId.
category.html is parameterized by categoryId and optional filter/sort and hire date parameters.
Linked from homepage category tiles, breadcrumb links, and related category links from other pages.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual hoist or related product, showing full technical specs, pricing, ratings, availability, and enabling hire, quote, wishlist, and comparison actions with date and quantity selection.
primary_functions: Show full product information, including capacity, lift height, chain length, weight, IP rating, environment suitability (e.g., outdoor rated), and compatible accessories.
Allow users to set hire dates and/or enter a hire duration in days for the product.
Allow users to set item quantity (e.g., hire two manual chain hoists).
Provide an Add to Cart button to start or continue a hire order.
Provide an Add to Quote button to add the product to the quote basket instead of directly hiring.
Provide controls to add or remove the product from the wishlist/favourites.
Provide a comparison toggle to add/remove the product from the comparison list.
Offer links to related products (e.g., compatible beam trolleys) and relevant safety guides.

incoming_params.description: Product.id of the item whose details should be displayed.
Optional ISO date string used to pre-populate the hire start date selector.
Optional ISO date string used to pre-populate the hire end date selector.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click View Cart or cart icon after successfully adding the product to the cart.
Click View Quote Basket after adding the product to the quote.
Click a View Comparison link after adding products to the comparison set.
Click View Wishlist link after saving the product as a favourite.
Click the breadcrumb or category link on the product detail page.

access_methods.description: Accessed as product.html?id=PRODUCT_ID, optionally with hireStart and hireEnd for preselected hire dates.
Linked from product cards on the category listing, featured products on the homepage, the comparison page, and the wishlist.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page showing the current hire basket, where users can review items, adjust quantities and dates, choose collection or delivery methods, and proceed to checkout.
primary_functions: List all hire items added to the cart with key details such as capacity, dates, duration, daily rate, and quantity.
Allow users to modify hire dates, duration, and quantity for each item.
Allow users to remove items from the cart.
Let users choose a collection or delivery method (e.g., Depot Pickup, Standard Delivery, Site Delivery) for the order.
Display estimated hire charges and any delivery or collection fees.
Provide a Proceed to Checkout button to move to the checkout page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the Proceed to Checkout button.
Click a product name or thumbnail within the cart to view its details.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the Cart link/icon in the header on every page.
Linked from add-to-cart confirmation messages on product and comparison pages.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout workflow page that uses the current cart and a draft hire order to collect guest contact details, address, delivery options, and special instructions before submitting the hire.
primary_functions: Allow users to choose to checkout as a guest without logging in.
Collect contact details such as full name and email address for the hire order.
Collect delivery or site address details, including street address, city, and postcode.
Allow users to select or confirm the delivery/collection method (Depot Pickup, Standard Delivery, Site Delivery).
Provide a delivery notes or special instructions field for site-specific details (e.g., outdoor rooftop installation).
Show an order summary including items, dates, duration, and estimated charges.
Allow users to confirm and submit the hire order.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Cart link or button from the checkout page.

access_methods.description: Reached after clicking Proceed to Checkout on the cart page.
Can be accessed directly via checkout.html, which then loads the current cart and draft order data.

pages.name: Quote Basket
pages.description: Quote basket page summarising all products added for quotation, allowing users to synchronise hire periods, set the site postcode, and submit a quote request.
primary_functions: List all items added to the quote basket, including product names and basic specifications.
Allow users to set or adjust hire start and end dates for each quoted item.
Allow users to enter a common hire period (e.g., 5 consecutive days) for all items when needed.
Provide fields to enter site or delivery postcode (e.g., 10001) and optional contact information for the quote.
Display an overview of the requested hire duration and items to be quoted.
Provide a Submit Quote Request button to send the quote request and display confirmation feedback.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product name inside the quote basket to review product details.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Quote Basket link in the header.
Linked from Add to Quote confirmations and from product pages when users choose to view the quote basket.

pages.name: Product Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison page presenting key specs for the current comparison set of hoist products and enabling direct actions such as viewing details, hiring, quoting, or saving to wishlist.
primary_functions: Display comparison tables for 2–4 selected products, matching features such as capacity, chain length, lift height, weight, environment rating, IP rating, and daily rate.
Allow users to easily identify the product with the lowest weight or longest chain length based on comparison rows.
Provide links (product names or View Details) to open each compared product’s detail page.
Allow users to add a compared product directly to the cart, quote basket, or wishlist if desired.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product name or View Details link in the comparison table.
Click View Cart after adding a compared product to the cart.
Click View Wishlist after saving a compared product to favourites.

access_methods.description: Opened via a Compare Selected action from the category listing page or by following a comparison link in the header if provided.

pages.name: Wishlist
pages.description: Wishlist or favourites page listing all products the user has saved for later, with quick paths to view details, hire, or request quotes.
primary_functions: Display all saved products with key details such as capacity, rating, daily rate, and thumbnail image.
Allow users to remove items from the wishlist.
Allow users to navigate from each saved item to its product detail page.
Allow users to start a hire (Add to Cart) or add to quote directly from wishlist items.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product title or image in the wishlist.
Click View Cart after adding a wishlist item to the cart.
Click View Quote Basket after adding a wishlist item to the quote.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Wishlist link in the header.
Linked from the My Account page as part of account-related navigation.

pages.name: My Account
pages.description: Single-user account profile page used as both registration and account management, where users can create/update their profile and navigate to saved resources and wishlist.
primary_functions: Provide a form to create or update basic account details such as name, email, and password.
Allow users to select a user type (e.g., Contractor) and save this preference.
Serve as the destination for Sign Up or Register links in the header.
Provide navigation to account-related sections such as Saved Resources and Wishlist.
Optionally display a summary of recent quotes or hires (non-essential for core tasks).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Saved Resources link within the My Account page.
Click Wishlist link within the My Account page.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the My Account link in the header.
Linked from registration CTAs, such as Sign Up buttons on the homepage.

pages.name: Saved Resources
pages.description: Account subpage that lists safety guides and other resource articles the user has previously saved, with options to open or remove them.
primary_functions: List all articles and guides the user has saved (e.g., Electric Hoist Safety guides).
Allow users to open a saved article in the article detail page.
Allow users to remove items from their saved resources list.
Provide navigation back to the My Account page and to the Resources listing page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved resource title to view the full article.
Click Back to My Account link.
Click Browse all Safety Guides link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via Saved Resources navigation from the My Account page.

pages.name: Resources Listing
pages.description: Listing page for resource articles (currently safety guides), with keyword search and type filters to help users find guidance and manuals.
primary_functions: Display a list of resource articles, filtered by category (e.g., Safety Guides) via a categoryId URL parameter.
Provide a search field to find articles by keyword (e.g., electric hoist safety).
Allow users to filter by resource type (e.g., safety_guide, manual, case_study) if needed.
Allow users to open an article detail page by clicking on an article title or card.

incoming_params.description: Resource category to list, e.g., safety_guides.
Optional keyword string used to filter safety guides (e.g., 'electric hoist safety').
Optional resource type filter such as safety_guide, manual, or case_study.
Current results page for article pagination.
Number of articles per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title or card.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Safety Guides link in the header, which passes categoryId=safety_guides.
Accessible via the Safety Guides footer link.
Parameterized by categoryId and optional searchQuery/resourceType filtering.

pages.name: Resource Article Detail
pages.description: Detail view for a single resource article or safety guide, showing full content plus actions to save/unsave the guide and navigate to related content.
primary_functions: Display the full content of the selected article or safety guide.
Provide a Save Guide or Add to My Resources button to add or remove the article from the user’s saved resources.
Link to related articles and relevant equipment categories for further exploration.
Allow users to navigate back to the Resources listing or to the Saved Resources page.

incoming_params.description: ResourceArticle.id of the article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Safety Guides link.
Click View My Saved Resources after saving an article.
Click a related equipment category link in the article.

access_methods.description: Accessed as article.html?id=ARTICLE_ID from resource listings or saved resources.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Static informational page describing the hoist hire company, its experience, safety focus, services offered, and depot locations.
primary_functions: Provide background on the company, experience, and safety standards.
Describe the range of services offered, including equipment hire, depot pickup, and site delivery.
List depot locations and basic information about coverage areas where appropriate.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Contact Us link from the About Us page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the About Us link in the footer.
Can be accessed directly via about.html.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page providing company contact details, depot addresses, and an enquiry form for hire, quote, or support questions.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as phone numbers, email addresses, and depot addresses.
Provide a contact form for sending enquiries about hire, quotes, or equipment selection.
Offer links to Help & FAQs and other support resources.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Help & FAQs link from the Contact page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Contact link in the footer.
Can be accessed directly via contact.html.

pages.name: Help & FAQs
pages.description: Help centre page containing frequently asked questions and guidance on the hire process, quotes, delivery options, and website features.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about the hire process, quote requests, delivery vs depot pickup, and payment.
Provide step-by-step guidance for tasks such as choosing equipment, setting hire dates, and using comparison or wishlist features.
Link to contact options for further assistance.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Contact Us link from within a FAQ answer.
Click Safety Guides link in an answer about safety information.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Help & FAQs link in the footer.
Can be accessed directly via help.html.

pages.name: Hire Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms and conditions page outlining the rules governing equipment hire, responsibilities, and policies such as damage and cancellation.
primary_functions: Present the terms and conditions governing equipment hire, including responsibilities and liabilities.
Explain policies related to hire duration, cancellations, damage, and insurance.
Support compliance and transparency for users reviewing hire agreements.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Hire Terms & Conditions link in the footer.
Can be accessed directly via terms.html.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Privacy policy page describing what data the site collects, how it is used and stored, and user rights regarding that data.
primary_functions: Describe what personal and usage data is collected and why.
Explain how user data is stored, protected, and shared.
Provide information on user rights and how to contact the company about privacy matters.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Privacy Policy link in the footer.
Can be accessed directly via privacy.html.

header_links.description: View and submit hire quote requests
View hire cart and proceed to checkout

footer_links.description: Help centre and frequently asked questions
